intro: Play as a dog and experience the adventure in first-person view!
description:
Immerse yourself in dynamic gameplay dog simulator, where you explore the world as a dog, collect coins and unlock new breeds. From fast Harts to small Dog - each breed has a unique speed and height, which changes the way you play!

 Take on the challenges!

Take on missions such as disturbing your owners or searching for treasures. Collect coins to unlock breeds in the store and become the best dog!

Game features:

Unique dog breeds - each with a different speed and height.
Missions: brawl, treasure collecting and more!
